violations.text: Cheese sticks were observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Based on time/temp, PIC moved cheese to another working cold hold unit for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 0 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for lactic acid sanitizer is between 704-1875 ppm. PIC manually mixed chemicals, retested, and put a work order in for premixer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
The floors in the kitchen area is in poor repair (needs resealing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026
American cheese was observed past the 7 day date marking. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
Milk cooler located in the gym area was not in good repair (ambient of 50F). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Wood is used in the construction of platform under grease trap in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The floors in the kitchen area is in poor repair (needs resealing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026

Cheese was observed held at 63 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved cheese to freezer for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
Block and shredded cheese were observed exceeding the 7 day date marking. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

Two milk coolers located in the cafeteria area were observed in poor repair. Ambient temperatures were observed between 54 and 80 F. No TCS items may be stored in these two coolers until ambient can be held at 41 F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

Wood is used in the construction of wooden shelf under the grease trap in the dish area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Working containers of sauces are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
Observed sink to be leaking from the faucet. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
Milk cooler gaskets for 3 units were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2023
